title: rubus oblongus
intro: Rubus oblongus, also known as the oblong bramble or Himalayan raspberry, is a type of plant that belongs to the rose family and is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus oblongus include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant is commonly prepared as a decoction or a tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is also used as a food source, with its fruit being edible and rich in vitamins and minerals.
